title: Rob's Craftable XP
description: Makes XP bottles craftable, finally a use for all these resources you get when exploring
body:
You can now craft XP-Bottles using varying resources :
- 4 Lapis-Lazuli -> 1 Bottle
- 2 Lapis-Lazuli + 2 Iron -> 1 Bottle
- 2 Lapis-Lazuli + 2 Gold -> 2 Bottles
- 2 Lapis-Lazuli + 2 Diamonds -> 4 Bottles

Now exploring and getting resources from structures isn't useless anymore, even if you have full diamond armor.
